아모스 5:1.content: Listen to this word which I take up for a lamentation over you, O house of Israel.

아모스 5:2.content: “The virgin of Israel has fallen; She shall rise no more. She is cast down on her land; there is no one to raise her up.”

아모스 5:3.content: For the Lord Yahweh says: “The city that went out a thousand shall have a hundred left, and that which went out one hundred shall have ten left to the house of Israel.”

아모스 5:4.content: For Yahweh says to the house of Israel: “Seek me, and you will live;

아모스 5:5.content: but don’t seek Bethel, nor enter into Gilgal, and don’t pass to Beersheba: for Gilgal shall surely go into captivity, and Bethel shall come to nothing.

아모스 5:6.content: Seek Yahweh, and you will live; lest he break out like fire in the house of Joseph, and it devour, and there be no one to quench it in Bethel.

아모스 5:7.content: You who turn justice to wormwood, and cast down righteousness to the earth:

아모스 5:8.content: seek him who made the Pleiades and Orion, and turns the shadow of death into the morning, and makes the day dark with night; who calls for the waters of the sea, and pours them out on the surface of the earth, Yahweh is his name,

아모스 5:9.content: who brings sudden destruction on the strong, so that destruction comes on the fortress.

아모스 5:10.content: They hate him who reproves in the gate, and they abhor him who speaks blamelessly.

아모스 5:11.content: Therefore, because you trample on the poor, and take taxes from him of wheat: You have built houses of cut stone, but you will not dwell in them. You have planted pleasant vineyards, but you shall not drink their wine.

아모스 5:12.content: For I know how many your offenses, and how great are your sins— you who afflict the just, who take a bribe, and who turn away the needy in the courts.

아모스 5:13.content: Therefore a prudent person keeps silent in such a time, for it is an evil time.

아모스 5:14.content: Seek good, and not evil, that you may live; and so Yahweh, the God of Armies, will be with you, as you say.

아모스 5:15.content: Hate evil, love good, and establish justice in the courts. It may be that Yahweh, the God of Armies, will be gracious to the remnant of Joseph.”

아모스 5:16.content: Therefore Yahweh, the God of Armies, the Lord, says: “Wailing will be in all the wide ways; and they will say in all the streets, ‘Alas! Alas!’ and they will call the farmer to mourning, and those who are skillful in lamentation to wailing.

아모스 5:17.content: In all vineyards there will be wailing; for I will pass through the middle of you,” says Yahweh.

아모스 5:18.content: “Woe to you who desire the day of Yahweh! Why do you long for the day of Yahweh? It is darkness, and not light.

아모스 5:19.content: As if a man fled from a lion, and a bear met him; Or he went into the house and leaned his hand on the wall, and a snake bit him.

아모스 5:20.content: Won’t the day of Yahweh be darkness, and not light? Even very dark, and no brightness in it?

아모스 5:21.content: I hate, I despise your feasts, and I can’t stand your solemn assemblies.

아모스 5:22.content: Yes, though you offer me your burnt offerings and meal offerings, I will not accept them; neither will I regard the peace offerings of your fat animals.

아모스 5:23.content: Take away from me the noise of your songs! I will not listen to the music of your harps.

아모스 5:24.content: But let justice roll on like rivers, and righteousness like a mighty stream.

아모스 5:25.content: “Did you bring to me sacrifices and offerings in the wilderness forty years, house of Israel?

아모스 5:26.content: You also carried the tent of your king and the shrine of your images, the star of your god, which you made for yourselves.

아모스 5:27.content: Therefore I will cause you to go into captivity beyond Damascus,” says Yahweh, whose name is the God of Armies.
